Auth callback

Handing this sign-in back to TableTop Nexus

If the app is installed, this page will try to reopen TableTop Nexus and pass the auth response back to the desktop client.

TableTop Nexus

Offline-first board, card, and party games for polished desktop play.

Published by DigiSolUK. Need help? support@tabletopnexus.app
